subject: Social Science
learning_outcomes: Know the types of forests in India
Know the distribution of forests in India
Know the wildlife sanctuaries and national parks in India

key_terms.definition: Forests found in areas with more than 250 cm rainfall — remain green throughout the year
Most widespread forests in India — trees shed leaves in dry season; 75-250 cm rainfall
Found in estuaries and lowland areas — Sundarbans is the largest
Mangrove forests in the Ganges delta — named after Sundari trees
Himalayan forests with varied vegetation due to altitude — Sal, Spruce, Silver
Areas created to protect diversity of flora and fauna — Nilgiri is India's first

mcqs.question: Sundarbans are found in
mcqs.explanation: Sundarbans mangrove forests are found in the Ganges delta in West Bengal

mcqs.question: The most widespread forest in India
mcqs.explanation: Deciduous monsoon forests are the most widespread in India

mcqs.question: India's first biosphere reserve
mcqs.explanation: Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve was India's first biosphere reserve (1986)

mcqs.question: The state which has the highest forest area in India
mcqs.explanation: Madhya Pradesh has the highest forest area in India

one_mark_questions.question: Why are the mangrove forests of the Ganges delta called Sundarbans?
one_mark_questions.answer: Sundari trees are found abundantly in these forests

one_mark_questions.question: Which was the first national park established in India?
Deciduous forests are called 'deciduous monsoon forests' in India. Why?
one_mark_questions.answer: The trees shed their leaves during the dry winter season
